occupation: Group Chief Executive Officer at Multiply Media Group
headline: Group CEO | Out-of-Home Media Leader | Driving Growth, Innovation & Digital Transformation in DOOH and Programmatic OOH | Led Strategic Acquisition & Global Expansion
summary: James Bicknell is Group CEO of Multiply Media Group (MMG), a premium Out-of-Home media…

experiences.title: Group Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
Building one of the fastest-growing Out-of-Home media groups in the world.
Driving growth, innovation, and results across every part of the business.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
As the CEO of BackLite Media and now overseeing operations for Viola Media, I am passionate about delivering impactful and innovative out-of-home (OOH) advertising solutions. Viola Outdoor is the leading OOH business in Abu Dhabi, proudly partnered with the Department of Municipalities and Transport (DMT). We specialize in premium lamppost and bridge banner advertising, helping brands connect with audiences in meaningful and dynamic ways.

With a track record of driving growth, forging strategic partnerships, and setting new benchmarks in the advertising industry, I am committed to elevating the OOH landscape across the region.
experiences.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
As the CEO of BackLite Media, a dynamic UAE-based out-of-home company headquartered in Dubai, UAE, I drive high-level strategic thinking and intelligent technology to ensure your brand and message reach the right audience.

At BackLite Media, we understand the importance of finding the right people to see your brand. That's why we gather over 1.5 billion location signals from more than 10 million mobile devices in the UAE daily to maximise brand visibility and deliver robust, measurable results.

Our carefully selected prime locations, including Dubai's iconic Sheikh Zayed Road, ensure that your brand is seen by millions of people from all walks of life every week.

At BackLite Media, we never compromise on quality. Our strong interpersonal skills and long-standing relationships with clients demonstrate the level of quality in our service offerings, down to the smallest detail.

If you're looking for prime sites, exceptional service, brand-strengthening associations, and data-driven insights, let's connect! At BackLite Media, we are committed to boosting your brand's desirability and driving your business growth.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
I had the privilege of working with RBX and Rockbridge Capital to expand this niche out-of-home (OOH) company throughout the United States.

At RBX Media, we were passionate about redefining outdoor advertising with iconic brand experiences in sought-after locations. Our architecturally designed signs and premium digital technology offered a unique blend of creativity and innovation designed to capture the attention of your target audience.

Together with RBX and Rockbridge Capital, we successfully expanded our presence across the United States, delivering measurable results and driving business growth.

experiences.title: Head of International Operations
experiences.description: I have managed outdoor advertising businesses across a diverse range of markets, including Hungary, Croatia, Spain, Poland, the Czech Republic, Thailand, Egypt, Jordan, and Abu Dhabi. My extensive experience in these regions has allowed me to develop a deep understanding of the local market dynamics, consumer behaviour, and regulatory landscape.

volunteer_work.title: Co-Founder
volunteer_work.description: Co-founder of our family foundation, helping small charities in the UK.

recommendations:
Jonathan Whately-Smith

I have had the pleasure of working with James for several years; collaborating on a number of hiring projects for Backlite Media. He has built a brilliant team there and is a true thought leader within the Out of Home advertising sector, across The Middle East. His unwavering professionalism makes him a joy to work with.

Sandy Seago

I enjoyed working with James during his time with RBX Media. I learned a great deal about the importance of advertising sign design, location importance, and the less is more approach of high-quality outdoor advertising products. James was a strong leader and a valued friend who I enjoyed getting to know and work alongside.
